message:
🐛 Fix 2 test failures after i18n wrapping in Pods component (#10498)

- Update empty state assertion to match i18n key 'pods.noPodIssues'
  instead of raw English string
- Replace window.confirm spy with ConfirmDialog mock since PR #10487
  replaced window.confirm() with a custom ConfirmDialog component

Fixes #10492

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
